name: Paparazzi / Papachinos
deal: Half-price pizza and pasta every Monday — all mains at 50% off when you dine in
howToClaim: Visit any Papachinos branch on a Monday. No voucher needed — discount applies automatically at the till

name: Spur
deal: Kids eat free on Sundays — one free kids meal per paying adult with the Spur Family Card
howToClaim: Register a Spur Family Card at your nearest Spur or online. Present card at checkout on Sundays

name: Mugg & Bean
deal: On The House loyalty — earn stamps per visit and redeem for free coffee and meals
howToClaim: Get an On The House card at any Mugg & Bean. Staff stamp it on each visit. Redeem when full

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Early Bird special — 20% off all mains when you dine before 6pm on weeknights
howToClaim: Dine in before 18:00 on weeknights. Mention the Early Bird special when ordering. No card needed

name: Panarottis
deal: Pizza for Two special — two medium pizzas and two Cokes from R189 every Tuesday and Wednesday
howToClaim: Visit any Panarottis on Tuesdays or Wednesdays and ask for the Pizza for Two deal at the till

name: Primi Piatti
deal: Happy Hour drinks at 50% off, plus complimentary olives and bread for the table before 6:30pm
howToClaim: Arrive before 18:30 on weeknights. Happy Hour pricing applies automatically at the bar
